title: Joe and Michael Regroup
summary: Joe Furnari and Michael Donovan discussed feedback on a document Vinnie liked and Michael Donovan's plan to leverage it for various content deliverables, emphasizing the need to convey timelines for these deliverables to Vinnie to secure more budget for demand generation. They also addressed the necessity of financial resources for database hygiene and improving data quality, with Joe Furnari asking Michael Donovan to develop a two- to three-priority budgetary proposal with costs and timelines for Vinnie’s approval. Joe Furnari conveyed Vinnie's preference for a fully dedicated, in-house marketing team, which conflicted with Michael Donovan's existing commitments and led to a difficult discussion about Michael Donovan's employment agreement and compensation.

decisions.description: Michael to develop a 2-3 priority budget proposal with costs and timelines.
Michael to map out simple flow and rough budget estimates for Vinnie.
Identify key customer accounts for targeting and segmentation.
Use specific dealerships (Burles Nissan, Matt Bowers, Northway Toyota) for targeting.
Approach budget conversation by highlighting underspent funds for repurposing.
Set objective to close 10 new deals per month.
Use a conservative 50% closing rate for SQLs, requiring 20 SQLs/month.
Incorporate Answering Machine Detection (AMD) to improve data quality.
Implement definitions, sources, and change log in reporting portal using FUMA.
